title: Slider and range slider for React
description: Accessible Slider with track, range, and thumb plus a RangeSlider for dual values—keyboard support, steps, and Tailwind-driven styling.

og.title: Slider · Zentauri UI
og.description: Single-value Slider compound components and a RangeSlider for filters and settings.

twitter.title: Slider · Zentauri UI
twitter.description: Single-value Slider compound components and a RangeSlider for filters and settings.

intro: Sliders pick numeric values along a continuum. The single Slider composes a track, optional filled range, and a keyboard-focusable thumb. RangeSlider covers min–max selections.
useCases: Filters for price, rating, or age bands.
Settings panels with bounded numeric controls.

faqs.question: Is the thumb keyboard accessible?
faqs.answer: Yes. The thumb uses role="slider" with Arrow, Home, End, and Page keys adjusting values according to min, max, and step.

faqs.question: Can I control values from React state?
faqs.answer: Pass value and onValueChange for controlled usage, or defaultValue for an uncontrolled slider. RangeSlider accepts tuples for paired values.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Pointer dragging uses the track geometry so thumbs stay aligned to the pointer path. Provide aria-label or aria-labelledby on the group for context.
